items.title: Colombia’s voters will decide between ‘two visions for the country’
items.summary: Al Jazeera’s Teresa Bo reports from Bogota.

items.title: Dron pogodio zgradu u Rumunjskoj
items.summary: DRON je rano ujutro pogodio zgradu u rumunjskom Galațiju, lakše ozlijedivši dvoje i izazvavši požar na 10. katu.

items.title: Rekordan pad broja stanovnika u Japanu
items.summary: STANOVNIŠTVO Japana smanjilo se za 2,5 posto u pet godina, pokazuju podaci popisa stanovništva objavljeni jutros, što predstavlja najveći pad od početka popisivanja 1920. godine.

items.title: Raketa Blue Origina eksplodirala na Floridi tijekom testa
items.summary: RAKETA tvrtke Blue Origin eksplodirala je na lansirnoj rampi na Floridi tijekom testa motora. Nema ozlijeđenih. Tvrtka Jeffa Bezosa potvrdila je 'anomaliju' i istražuje uzrok incidenta.

items.title: SAD će brazilske bande proglasiti terorističkim organizacijama
items.summary: SJEDINJENE Američke Države planiraju proglasiti dvije najveće brazilske kriminalne bande terorističkim organizacijama, najavio je američki državni tajnik Marco Rubio nakon poziva desne oporbe Washingtonu da to učini.

items.title: Rusija i Izrael zbog spolnog nasilja u ratovima završili na crnoj listi UN-a
items.summary: IZRAELSKA i ruska vojska uvrštene su na crnu listu Ujedinjenih naroda zbog seksualnog nasilja u sukobima, prvenstveno na temelju svjedočanstava zatvorenika, navodi se u godišnjem izvješću u koje je agencija France Presse dobila uvid.

items.title: At least three dead after fire destroys Dallas apartment complex
items.summary: A large fire destroyed an apartment complex in Dallas after crews responded to reports of a gas leak.

items.title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket explodes on launchpad in Florida
items.summary: The incident is the latest setback for Jeff Bezos’s space venture as it seeks to narrow the gap with Elon Musk’s SpaceX.

items.title: Lebanon Latest: Mass evacuations as Israel expands attacks
items.summary: Al Jazeera’s Obaida Hitto brings you the latest from southern Lebanon amidst increasing Israeli attacks.

items.title: Anthropic soars to $965bn valuation, leapfrogging OpenAI
items.summary: Claude maker raises $65bn from investors ahead of expected initial public offering.

items.title: Moment Blue Origin rocket explodes during test in Florida
items.summary: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket exploded on a launch pad at Cape Canaveral in Florida on Thursday night.

items.title: US Treasury secretary confirms plans for banknote featuring Trump’s face
items.summary: Proposed $250 bill would mark the first time a living person has appeared on US currency in more than a century.

items.title: Italy restores lucky testicles on bull mosaic worn down by tourists
items.summary: The artwork is the centre of a tradition that involves visitors performing three spins on it for good fortune.

items.title: US to designate two Brazilian gangs as ‘terrorist’ organisations
items.summary: Trump administration has used crime and drug trafficking to push for greater US military influence across Latin America.

items.title: Iran war live: Tehran, Trump yet to comment on 60-day truce extension plan
items.summary: Lebanese PM Nawaf Salam says 'nothing can justify' Israel's military onslaught against 'peaceful people' in Lebanon.

items.title: Netanyahu orders Israeli army to seize 70 percent of Gaza
items.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu says he has ordered the military to take control of 70 percent of Gaza.

items.title: Portugal breaks hottest May day record as Europe swelters in heatwave
items.summary: French students are taking their exams in baking schools, while red alerts are issued in Italy.

items.title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
items.summary: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.

items.title: Iran ambassador hits out at ‘country to the north’ in US World Cup visa row
items.summary: Iran's football team still lacks US visas and is not competing on 'equal terms', Tehran's envoy to Mexico says.

items.title: Tense protests erupt outside Delaney Hall immigrant detention centre in US
items.summary: A hunger strike at the New Jersey facility has raised questions about conditions in US immigration detention centres.
